intentAndPurpose.intent: Validation / feedback row under an input. variant = semantic role, attention = low(text)/medium(tint)/high(fill), size s/m/l. Negative announces as assertive alert; others as polite status. customIcon overrides the variant-default icon. Empty message renders nothing.

props.name: attention
props.description: low = text only, medium = tinted, high = filled.

props.name: feedback_message
props.description: Primary copy. Falls back to `children` when omitted.

props.name: customIcon
props.description: Overrides the variant-default icon. MUST be a JDS <Icon> / RN-SVG component. — [warn] Pass a JDS <Icon> component; native has no semantic icon-name catalogue.

props.name: children
props.description: Rich content when feedback_message is not set.

props.name: role
props.description: Overrides the default role ('alert' for negative, 'status' otherwise).

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible name override; falls back to the message.
